violations.text: Signage is lacking at the bathroom and dining room sinks.A sign or poster that notifies FOOD EMPLOYEES to wash their hands shall be provided at all HANDWASHING SINKS used by FOOD EMPLOYEES and shall be clearly visible to FOOD EMPLOYEES New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
3 bay sink is in poor repair. Leakage observed at the pvc pipes under 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
